Bash(/private/tmp/spoke-tts-multi-model-rebase-0331/.venv/bin/python -c "
import sounddevice as sd
import numpy as np

sample_rate = 24000
duration = 3.0
t = np.linspace\(0, duration, int\(sample_rate * duration\), dtype=np.float32\)
tone = 0.5 * np.sin\(2 * np.pi * 440 * t\)

print\('Playing 3s 440Hz test tone NOW...'\)
sd.play\(tone, samplerate=sample_rate, device=1\)
sd.wait\(\)
print\('Done'\)
" 2>&1)

import sounddevice as sd
import numpy as np
sr = 24000
t = np.linspace\(0, 2.0, int\(sr * 2.0\), dtype=np.float32\)
tone = 0.5 * np.sin\(2 * np.pi * 440 * t\)

sd.play\(tone, samplerate=sr, device=1, blocking=True\)
print\('Done'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(~/.local/bin/epistaxis-commit "Analytical capsule gradient, wider center wash with smoothstep feather, mask caching

Replace finite-difference capsule gradient \(4 extra sdCapsule calls per pixel\)
with analytical capsuleGradient\(\) — just clamp + subtract + normalize.

Grow the center wash region \(inset 25% vs 45%\) so more of the compressed
interior gets blurred over. Widen the feather from 24px linear to 48px
smoothstep for a softer transition at the wash boundary.

Cache the capsule alpha mask CIImage across frames — only recompute when
dimensions change, eliminating per-frame NumPy + CGImageCreate overhead.

Widen activeInnerLimit from 0.45 to 0.55 so more deep-interior pixels
hit the early bailout and skip the expensive gradient + remap work.")
Bash(~/.local/bin/epistaxis-commit "Add per-phase frame timing instrumentation for backdrop pipeline")
Bash(~/.local/bin/epistaxis-commit "Add SCK stream diagnostic logging, enable SCK for testing")
Bash(~/.local/bin/epistaxis-commit "Fix SCK addStreamOutput return value unpacking for PyObjC 12")
Bash(~/.local/bin/epistaxis-commit "Fix SCK startCapture completion handler to match PyObjC 0-arg block signature")
Bash(~/.local/bin/epistaxis-commit "Accept None output_type from SCK — frames were arriving but silently dropped")
Bash(~/.local/bin/epistaxis-commit "Fix CoreMedia function signatures for PyObjC toll-free bridged CF types")
